data.name: 魔導士蒂亞與不可思議的大圖書館
data.detailed_description:
在一個奇幻的世界裡，雙胞胎姐妹蒂亞和盧米耶魯幸福地居住在一個名叫阿洛美亞的村莊裡。身為醫師，她們每天都在治病救人，用魔法為村民們緩解病痛。

在看似普通的一天，兩姐妹在用餐的時候聽到地下室裡有奇怪的聲音。那裡並不是個普通的地下室，而是一間由姐妹們的祖先傳承下來的，裝滿了各種不可思議的書籍的大圖書館。

在那裡，兩姐妹找到了一本散發著光芒的魔導書。就在姐姐蒂亞想要用手觸碰那本書的一刹那，它便自動打開了。然後，一隻惡魔便在眨眼之間跳了出來，並且抓走了妹妹盧米耶魯。

“如果你還想見到你妹妹的話，就來利用我給你的線索找到她吧！”

蒂亞知道擺在自己面前的可能是一個不折不扣的陷阱，但是她依然咬緊牙關，鼓足了勇氣，毅然決然地踏上了尋找妹妹的旅途。

遊戲要素：

  • 回合制RPG要素
  • 積攢經驗，提升等級
  • 利用技能樹學習新技能
  • 使用魔力來變得更加強大
  • 讓不同的角色在戰鬥中支援自己
data.about_the_game:
在一個奇幻的世界裡，雙胞胎姐妹蒂亞和盧米耶魯幸福地居住在一個名叫阿洛美亞的村莊裡。身為醫師，她們每天都在治病救人，用魔法為村民們緩解病痛。

在看似普通的一天，兩姐妹在用餐的時候聽到地下室裡有奇怪的聲音。那裡並不是個普通的地下室，而是一間由姐妹們的祖先傳承下來的，裝滿了各種不可思議的書籍的大圖書館。

蒂亞知道擺在自己面前的可能是一個不折不扣的陷阱，但是她依然咬緊牙關，鼓足了勇氣，毅然決然地踏上了尋找妹妹的旅途。

遊戲要素：

  • 積攢經驗，提升等級
  • 利用技能樹學習新技能
  • 使用魔力來變得更加強大
  • 讓不同的角色在戰鬥中支援自己
data.short_description: 身為雙胞胎姐妹的蒂亞和盧米耶魯在一個與世無爭的小鎮開著一家診所，但是這平靜的生活卻被一隻魅魔打破了。魅魔抓走了妹妹盧米耶魯，姐姐蒂亞也因而踏上了在各個世界之間尋找妹妹的旅途。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.name: Tear and the Library of Labyrinths
data.detailed_description:
In a world where magic is as common as the air we breathe, twin sisters Tear and Lumiere run a clinic in the remote village of Armeria. There they use their magic to heal the sick and injured.

One day, while the sisters are enjoying a meal, they are interrupted by a strange noise coming from their basement. However, it is no ordinary basement, but a library full of magical books passed down through their family for generations.

Fearing that it may be a ghost, they cautiously go to investigate and find a book engulfed in a glowing light. Instinctively, Tear reached out toward the glowing tome and as she did, it flipped open!

Before either of the sisters could blink, out leaped a terrifying demon who grabbed Lumiere and pulled her into the tome.

"If you want to see your sister alive again, then you'll have to come get her! Hahaha!"

Knowing that it may be a trap, Tear gathered her courage to follow them and bring her sister home safe and sound.

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Turn-based Combat

  • Level Up with Experience

  • Gain New Skills with Levels

  • Get Help in Battle from the Fox Spirit Korin
data.about_the_game:
In a world where magic is as common as the air we breathe, twin sisters Tear and Lumiere run a clinic in the remote village of Armeria. There they use their magic to heal the sick and injured.

One day, while the sisters are enjoying a meal, they are interrupted by a strange noise coming from their basement. However, it is no ordinary basement, but a library full of magical books passed down through their family for generations.

Before either of the sisters could blink, out leaped a terrifying demon who grabbed Lumiere and pulled her into the tome.

Features:

  • Classic RPG Experience

  • Turn-based Combat

  • Level Up with Experience

  • Gain New Skills with Levels

  • Get Help in Battle from the Fox Spirit Korin
data.short_description: The twin sisters Tear and Lumiere enjoy a happy life running their clinic. But when a demon abducts her sister, Tear must summon her courage to venture through worlds within magical tomes to bring her sister home safe.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
